visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a middle-aged man in a white short-sleeved shirt and dark pants performing on a stage. He is holding a gold microphone, singing and dancing energetically with a wide smile. Several young children are on the stage with him, some moving around while others stand still. The background is a dark curtain decorated with many small white fairy lights. (2) The scene cuts to a young man with brown hair wearing a black jacket over a white shirt, laughing uncontrollably while looking at a screen off-camera. Beside him, a woman wearing a black hat and a black top covers her eyes with one hand while laughing heartily. A graphic overlay appears at the bottom with a meter labeled 'E-person Index' that quickly fills up to 200. (3) The scene shifts to a large, well-lit banquet hall filled with guests seated at round tables. A younger man in a black suit attempts to escort the dancing older man away from the guest area. The older man playfully resists, breaking free to continue his lively dance moves among the tables, drawing laughter and attention from the seated guests. (4) The video returns to the young man and woman from the second phase. They are now seated at a wooden table in what appears to be a restaurant or home. The woman gestures animatedly while speaking and laughing, looking directly toward the young man, who responds with an amused and somewhat shocked facial expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我每天趴踢啊. [Variety]: 趴 趴 趴踢啊. (2) [Subtitle]: 尊重. [Logo]: E人指數. (3) [Variety]: (看不下去). (4) [Variety]: (嘗試帶回阿公). (5) [Variety]: (掙脫). [Variety]: 哈哈哈哈. (6) [Variety]: (再次掙脫). (7) [Subtitle]: 難怪小舅舅都不結婚. (8) [Subtitle]: 你先把這影片給他未來的老婆看. [Subtitle]: 可不可以接受.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main performer, 2 reaction hosts, 1 escorting man, many banquet guests and children on stage.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man in a white business-casual shirt and dark trousers; a young man with dyed brown hair in a black kimono-style outer layer; a woman in a black hat and black vest; a young man in a black formal suit.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A performance stage with a black curtain and string lights; a banquet hall with large floral arrangements, white projectors, and many round tables with guests; an indoor dining area with wooden furniture and wall decorations.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-tempo, energetic EDM music featuring a strong electronic beat. A male voice is singing enthusiastically and loudly over the track, accompanied by faint background cheering and clapping. The spectral brightness is high, emphasizing the festive atmosphere. (2) A sharp transition occurs with a 'whoosh' sound effect, leading into the loud, high-pitched laughter of multiple people. A male voice speaks rapidly and with high emotional arousal, expressing amusement. The background music continues at a slightly lower volume beneath the dialogue. (3) The acoustic environment shifts to a more reverberant hall setting. Crowds can be heard laughing and talking in the background. The music persists, but the primary vocal layer now consists of spontaneous laughter and shorter verbal exclamations as a struggle or movement is perceived through sound texture. (4) The final phase features a clear conversational interplay between a man and a woman. Their voices are mid-pitched with a friendly, comedic tone and frequent rising intonations. The speech rate is fast, and the laughter remains a constant rhythmic element in the audio track until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a humorous social media post capturing an older family member's extroverted and energetic performance at a wedding banquet. It uses a reaction-style format where the creator (Cai Aga) and his companion laugh at the older man's 'E-person' (extroverted) behavior, creating a lighthearted and relatable family comedy piece.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'variety show' editing styles common in Taiwanese YouTube culture, including colorful text and exaggerated sound effects to highlight funny moments.
